Journey成长与历程

2024 - Present

AI & Full Stack Exploration

Deep dive into Next.js, AI IDEs, and modern full-stack architectures. Building projects with Vibe Coding setups.

202x - 2024

Frontend & Cross-Platform Developer

Developing responsive web applications and cross-platform mobile apps using React, Vue3, and Flutter/UniApp.

202x

The Journey Begins

Started the journey of coding, learning HTML/CSS, JS, and establishing forming the base of engineering logic.

Open to Work

Looking for exciting opportunities in Full-Stack & Frontend Development.目前正在寻找前端/全栈开发机会，随时欢迎沟通或内推。
